description_long: This is a stylish, open-toe high-heeled shoe featuring a striking red color and an intricate cut-out design across the upper. The shoe has a medium-height heel and a closed back with a visible zipper for easy wear. The cut-out pattern creates a cage-like effect, offering both breathability and a fashionable look. The sole and heel appear to be made of a sturdy material, while the upper is likely crafted from synthetic leather or suede. The interior is lightly padded for comfort, and the open-toe design makes it suitable for warmer weather. The overall construction suggests a blend of elegance and urban chic, ideal for city outings or social events.
description: A red, open-toe high-heeled shoe with an intricate cut-out upper and a back zipper, blending elegance with urban style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the detailed cut-out pattern, open toe, and medium-height heel.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the closed back and visible zipper for entry.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the cut-out design and heel structure.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the open toe and symmetrical cut-out pattern across the upper.
